On the Truck

Daily Specials

Burgers are always on. Every day brings something different - come back all week and you'll never eat the same thing twice.

Monday

Smash Monday

Double smash burger special. All smashburger combos.

Tuesday

Brisket Tuesday

Smoked brisket sandwich or platter with coleslaw.

Wednesday

Wing Wednesday

Nashville hot wings all day. Bone-in or boneless.

Thursday

Rib Thursday

Smoked ribs by the rack or half rack. While they last.

Friday

Pulled Pork Friday

Slow-smoked pulled pork sandwich with coleslaw.

Saturday & Sunday

Weekend Wild Card

Follow us on social to see what's hitting the truck this weekend.

Our Story

Bold Flavor.
Family Made.

Smash N Smoke is built on a simple belief - good food should hit hard and come straight from the heart. This truck is what happens when you put everything you've got into something that matters.

Every item on this menu was built to make people stop what they're doing and pay attention. Nashville hot done right. Smashburgers the way they're supposed to be. Daily specials that keep you coming back.

We're not a chain. We're not a franchise. We're family. And every plate we put out carries that.

The name on the menu - LOKÉ - belongs to Lucca, Keely, and Emilia Owens. Three reasons this truck exists.

"Bold Flavor. Family Made. Done Right."

- Tracey Owens, Smash N Smoke
